title: viola nuttallii subsp. praemorsa
intro: Viola nuttallii subsp. praemorsa, also known as Purple Prairie Clover or Purple Clover, is a flowering plant species native to Western North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The Purple Prairie Clover is also used for its health benefits, such as supporting digestive health and reducing inflammation in the body. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
